cmu.title: Visiting Scholar
cmu.subtitle: Carnegie Mellon University
cmu.heading: Computer Science Department · Hosted by professor Ruben Martins
cmu.description: Benchmarked two unsatisfiable core extraction methodologies for unweighted MaxSAT. Using the MSU3 algorithm and the Glucose 3 solver via PySAT, we compared the lower bound precision and core minimality of internal solver assumptions against external resolution proof processing with DRAT-trim.

media.title: A Comparative Analysis of UNSAT Core Extraction Methodologies for Unweighted MaxSAT

inesc.title: Research Assistant
inesc.subtitle: INESC-ID
inesc.heading: OptiGov Project · Supervised by professor Alessandro Gianola
inesc.description: Applied ACTLChecker to validate a rigorous implementation of the BPMN of the ICT Approval Protocol at IGFEJ, a public body under the Portuguese Ministry of Justice, by checking concurrent logs against property specifications in Action Temporal Logic, a formalism created in my master's thesis.

media.title: First-Order Linear Temporal Logic for Testing Distributed Protocols
Application of ACTLChecker to the ICT Approval Protocol at IGFEJ as part of OptiGov

ist.title: Teaching Assistant
ist.subtitle: Instituto Superior Técnico
ist.heading: Databases Course · Bachelor, Computer Science and Engineering
ist.description: Instructed lab sessions and coordinated student groups in the design of relational databases, guiding entity-relationship modeling, schema normalization, transaction processing, and concurrency control while providing technical support for SQL implementation, project evaluation, and exam proctoring.
